meta.siteDescription: Read all 700 verses of the Bhagavad Gita with Sanskrit, transliteration, multiple translations, audio recitations, and search. Free, no ads, no paywall.

home.description: Read all 700 verses. Ask Krishna for guidance. Reflect on what speaks to you. Free, no ads, no paywall — ever.
home.featuresHeading: Six ways the Gita meets you
home.featuresSubheading: Built to honour the text — and serve the person reading it.
home.footerTagline: Built with devotion. Free, no ads, no paywall.

features.readDesc: Sanskrit, transliteration, translation, commentary — every verse, every chapter.
features.askDesc: Type a worry. Receive verses that speak to it. Free guidance, always.
features.dailyDesc: 8 moods, curated verses. A daily ritual that meets you where you are.
features.reflectDesc: A journal tied to verses. Watch your understanding deepen week by week.
features.shareDesc: Every verse becomes a shareable card with a unique mandala.
features.whatsappDesc: Receive a verse every morning on the platform you already check.

verse.noTranslation: No translation available for the selected combination.
verse.signInNudge: Sign in to bookmark and reflect on this verse.

search.title: Search verses
search.placeholder: Search a feeling, a question, or a verse number…
search.hint: Type at least 2 characters or a verse reference like 2.47

journal.heading: Journal
journal.placeholder: What is this verse asking of you today?
journal.saveError: Couldn't save. Retrying when you keep typing.
journal.deleteConfirm: Delete this reflection? This cannot be undone.
journal.emptyBody: Open any verse and tap "Journal" to start a reflection.
journal.newGenericBody: Pick a verse to reflect on.

bookmarks.heading: Saved verses
bookmarks.emptyBody: Tap the heart on any verse to save it for later.

me.continueReadingEmpty: Pick a verse to begin your journey.
me.continueReadingCta: Pick up where you left off →
me.todayMoodBody: Pick a feeling. We'll find a verse for it.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to bookmark, reflect, and receive your daily verse.
auth.termsLine: By signing in you agree to our
auth.verifyBodyKnown: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. The link is valid for 24 hours.
auth.verifyBody: We sent you a sign-in link. The link is valid for 24 hours.
auth.verifyHint: If you don't see it, check spam or promotions. The sender is onboarding@resend.dev.
auth.errorSendFailed: We couldn't send the magic link. Please try again or use Google sign-in.
auth.errorGeneric: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
